content:
muti package wkg publish PR is out of draft!
https://github.com/bytecodealliance/wasm-pkg-tools/pull/215

Note that this PR is not UX complete, there are two follow-ups to this PR to ensure the feature is intuitive:

  • multi package wkg wit fetch
  • pacakge groups/workspace members to ensure consistency in grouping and avoid calling the same arguments repeatedly
initial multi package publishing is now merged!
